text: Being here, I feel a sense of anticipation and curiosity. The open, modern space before me is inviting, but also quiet and empty, evoking contemplation. I move to the colorful, stimulating exhibit and find my mind awakened by the possibilities of innovation and discovery. The dialogue between technology and humanity surrounds me, urging reflection on our coexistence with intelligent machines. I feel both small in the scheme of progress, and empowered to ask deeper questions about meaning and connection in our evolving world.
